title: release/22.x: Attributor: Use anchor scope for SimplifyQuery context (#178958)
author: llvmbot

  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %is.not.nan)
  call void @extern.use(float %arg)

}

}

entry:

  %call7 = call double @issue178954_callee(<2 x double> %vecinit1.i.i.i.i43)
